risks.title: Lionel Messi admits he’s tired after leading Argentina to his third World Cup final at 39 years old
risks.description: Lionel Messi has led Argentina to yet another World Cup final, but it looks increasingly likely this might be his last. Messi dropped two assists in Argentina’s 2- 1 comeback win over England in the 2026 FIFA World Cup semi-finals.
